action_set_definitions.name: query_entity_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full status and properties of a specific entity (Robot, Order, MSU, or Station) by its unique ID. Used to check current State of Charge (SoC), locations, and remaining items in an order.

entity_id.description: The unique identifier of the entity (e.g., 'AMR-05', 'ORD-5521').

action_set_definitions.name: search_entities_by_type
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of IDs and locations for all entities of a specific category (e.g., chargers, storage slots).

entity_type.description: The category of entities to locate.

action_set_definitions.name: move_robot
action_set_definitions.description: Navigates the robot to the location of a target entity ID. Movement consumes 'battery_soc'.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_msu_docking
action_set_definitions.description: Performs docking (lifting) or undocking (releasing) an MSU at the current location.

action_set_definitions.name: charge_robot
action_set_definitions.description: Increases the 'battery_soc' of a robot while it is at a 'charger' entity. The process continues until the target_soc is reached.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_item_pick
action_set_definitions.description: Records the pick of a specific item from an MSU at a workstation for a specific order. Updates the order's internal progress.

action_set_definitions.name: update_order_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the fulfillment status of an order to 'completed'.

state_description.inventory: A mapping of storage locations (e.g., bin IDs) to their contents, including SKU IDs and quantities.
state_description.agents: The current status of all warehouse robots, including their coordinate positions, current load (SKUs carried), and availability status.
state_description.orders: A list of customer orders containing required SKUs, quantities, and current fulfillment status (e.g., 'pending', 'picking', 'completed').
state_description.layout: The static grid or map of the warehouse, defining walkable paths, picking zones, and packing stations.
